retrieved_result: What are the methods that attackers use to DDoS a Minecraft server? \"Ofer Gayer, Security Researcher turned Product Manager Updated Jan 24, 2017 · Author has 92 answers and 180.1k answer views Spoofed TCP attacks are very common, and can be quite a hassle for someone without proper DDo S mitigation technology. These can be spoofed SYNs, ACKs, FINs or any combination
Decision_Reason: The page discusses DDoS methods and Minecraft server security, not debugging API integrations.
